import { PieChart, Pie, Cell, Tooltip, Legend, ResponsiveContainer, } from "recharts"; import type { AttendanceReportDto } from "../../../../services/schoolReportService"; import StatCard from "./StatCard"; import { Calendar, AlertCircle, CheckCircle } from "lucide-react"; const AttendanceTab = ({ data }: { data: AttendanceReportDto }) => { const attendanceStatusData = [ { name: "Trung b├¼nh c├│ mß║╖t", value: data.overallAttendanceRate, color: "#10B981" }, { name: "Vß║»ng hß╗ìc", value: 100 - data.overallAttendanceRate, color: "#E5E7EB" }, ]; return (
{/* Summary Cards */}
} label="Tß╗╖ lß╗ç chuy├¬n cß║ºn chung" value={`${data.overallAttendanceRate.toFixed(1)}%`} color="blue" /> } label="Hß╗ìc sinh vß║»ng nhiß╗üu" value={data.chronicAbsentees.length} color="orange" /> } label="Sß╗æ tiß║┐t ─æ├ú ─æiß╗âm danh" value={data.totalSessions} color="green" />
{/* Attendance Summary Pie */}

Tß╗òng quan hiß╗çn diß╗çn

{data.totalSessions > 0 ? ( `${name} ${((percent || 0) * 100).toFixed(0)}%`} > {attendanceStatusData.map((entry, index) => ( ))} `${Number(v).toFixed(1)}%`} /> ) : (

Ch╞░a c├│ dß╗» liß╗çu ─æiß╗âm danh trong 30 ng├áy qua

)}
{/* Chronic Absentees List */}

Cß║únh b├ío vß║»ng hß╗ìc bß║Ñt th╞░ß╗¥ng

{data.chronicAbsentees.length > 0 ? (
{data.chronicAbsentees.slice(0, 5).map((s) => (
{s.studentName.charAt(0)}

{s.studentName}

{s.className}

{s.absentDays}

Ng├áy vß║»ng

))}
) : (

Tß║Ñt cß║ú ß╗òn ─æß╗ïnh

)}
{/* Attendance by Class Table */}

Chi tiß║┐t ─æiß╗âm danh theo lß╗¢p

{data.attendanceByClass.length > 0 ? ( data.attendanceByClass.map((c) => ( )) ) : ( )}
Lß╗¢p S─⌐ sß╗æ Tß╗╖ lß╗ç chuy├¬n cß║ºn Vß║»ng (TB/Tiß║┐t) Trß╗à (TB/Tiß║┐t) Sß╗æ tiß║┐t
{c.className} {c.studentCount}
= 90 ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-orange-500'}`} style={{ width: `${c.attendanceRate}%` }} />
{c.attendanceRate}%
{(c.absentCount / (c.totalSessions || 1)).toFixed(1)} {(c.lateCount / (c.totalSessions || 1)).toFixed(1)} {c.totalSessions}
Kh├┤ng c├│ dß╗» liß╗çu chi tiß║┐t cho c├íc lß╗¢p
); }; export default AttendanceTab;

Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
